name: okcomputers
description: AI agent toolkit for OK Computers + Ring Gates + Net Protocol onchain storage on Base

BANKR_API_KEY.description: Bankr API key for signing and submitting onchain transactions. Required for all write operations (posting messages, setting pages, sending emails). Read operations do not require this key.

okc-relay.vercel.app.description: Self-hosted JSONP relay for loading Net Protocol content into OK Computer iframe sandboxes. Source: github.com/Potdealer/ok-computers. Only used by net-loader.html template, not by the core library.

api.bankr.bot.description: Bankr transaction submission API. Standard service used by all Bankr-integrated agents for signing and submitting Base transactions.

author: potdealer + olliebot
